达.origin: The walking road 辶 helps something big 大 finally arrive and reach its goal.

sentence.en: The train arrived at the station.

音.origin: A tongue 立 standing in an open mouth 日 makes a sound you can hear.

sentence.en: Her voice sounds very nice.

市.origin: A roof 亠 over a cloth 巾 stall — picture a busy market full of shops.

sentence.en: I live in a big city.

行.origin: Tiny steps 彳 and 亍 on the left and right — like feet walking down a road.

sentence.en: We walk along the little path.

选.origin: Walking 辶 ahead 先 to pick the very best one — that is how you choose.

sentence.en: Please choose a color.

营.origin: Grass 艹 over a roof 冖 and two mouths 吕 — a busy camp where people live and work.

sentence.en: Vegetables have lots of nutrition.

泳.origin: Add water 氵 to forever 永, and you can swim and swim all day long.

sentence.en: In summer I like to swim.

功.origin: Hard work 工 plus strength 力 — keep trying and you will earn great success.

sentence.en: He successfully climbed the mountain.

影.origin: Sunlight on scenery 景 with feathery rays 彡 — together they cast a shadow.

sentence.en: Let us go watch a movie together.

统.origin: A silk thread 纟 ties everything together into one neat, whole system.

sentence.en: The whole class wears the uniform together.

响.origin: A mouth 口 facing 向 a direction — call out and your voice rings loudly.

sentence.en: There is a loud noise outside the door.

骑.origin: A horse 马 plus 奇 — hop on its back and away you ride!

sentence.en: Big brother rides a bike to school.

总.origin: Many mouths 口 speaking with one heart 心 — adding it all up, together always.

sentence.en: He is always very serious in class.

近.origin: Walking 辶 just an axe-handle 斤 away — that means it is very near.

sentence.en: The school is near my home.

运.origin: Clouds 云 walking 辶 across the sky — they move and carry things far away.

sentence.en: Exercise makes us healthier.

但.origin: A person 亻 beside the dawn 旦 — but wait, the day has only just begun.

sentence.en: It is dark, but I am not afraid.

商.origin: A roof and busy stall shape — picture traders talking and selling at a shop.

sentence.en: Mom goes to the shop to buy things.

卖.origin: Ten 十 sits above buy 买 — sell your goods so others can buy them.

sentence.en: He sells fruit on the street.

联.origin: An ear 耳 listening links friends together — connect, join, and stay in touch.

sentence.en: My classmates and I keep in contact often.

适.origin: A tongue 舌 walking 辶 along — finding the path that fits and suits you just right.

sentence.en: This piece of clothing fits very well.

男.origin: Strength 力 working in the field 田 — that is a strong man or boy.

sentence.en: That boy runs very fast.

演.origin: Water 氵 flowing smoothly 寅 — like a story that unfolds when you perform on stage.

sentence.en: They are performing on the stage.

解.origin: A knife 刀 cuts the horn 角 from an ox 牛 — taking it apart to understand it.

sentence.en: I solved this problem.

题.origin: The 页 (head) side reminds us a question puts a topic at the top to think about.

sentence.en: The teacher asked a question.

虽.origin: A mouth 口 above a little bug 虫 — although it is small, it still has plenty to say.

sentence.en: Although it rains, we still go.

养.origin: A sheep 羊 above a child 儿 — feed and care for them so they grow up strong.

sentence.en: Grandma grows flowers at home.

未.origin: A young tree 木 with a small top branch — not yet grown, still in the future.

sentence.en: In the future I want to be a teacher.

社.origin: An altar 礻 beside the earth 土 — people gather here as one big society.

sentence.en: We all live in society.

除.origin: A hill 阝 with leftover 余 swept away — to remove and clear things out.

sentence.en: Except for him, everyone came.

旅.origin: A flag 方 leading people 氏 onward — picture a group setting off to travel.

sentence.en: During summer break we go traveling.

银.origin: The metal radical 钅 plus 艮 — a shiny silver coin made of bright metal.

sentence.en: Dad goes to the bank to deposit money.

端.origin: Stand 立 tall and straight 耑 — holding something steady right at the very tip.

sentence.en: Please sit up straight and properly.

护.origin: A hand 扌 guarding a door 户 — keeping your home safe means to protect it.

sentence.en: We must protect little animals.

业.origin: Its toothy top once drew a wooden rack — now it means work and a trade.

sentence.en: I finished today's homework.

康.origin: Under a roof 广 with help 隶 inside, a cozy home keeps everyone safe and healthy.

sentence.en: Exercise more to stay healthy.
